data.body: LOCAL full-suite pre-flight analysis: 6240 passed. The 3 failures + 1 error are ALL local-environment artifacts, NOT regressions: (1) test_config_show/test_config_perf x3 fail because this dev machine has a user config ~/.config/rebar/config.toml that leaks into 'no config' assertions — proven: they PASS with a clean HOME/XDG. (2) grounding test_engine_b teardown error = its 'repo HEAD moved during test' hygiene guard tripped because I committed 5b01 (0fdc233) WHILE the suite was running (started at 46f8/6b1962f). Clean GitHub Actions CI has neither the user config nor a moving HEAD, so Gerrit Verified should be green. Authoritative signal remains the Verified votes.
